title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 6-A.  LOUISIANA VEHICLE PROTECTION PRODUCT ACT

§1271.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the "Louisiana Vehicle Protection Product Act".

Acts 2007, No. 388, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2008.
